Fantastic Budget Dress: 36H Bust It is extremely hard for me to find a wedding dress that covers up my chest and still allows me to breath. I usually require expensive alterations. I'm 5'5, weigh 155 lbs, 42 bustline with thin bra, 33 waist, 39 hips. I had the dress length shortened in the front so I could walk and left the length in the back to create a small sweeping train. I had the slip part of the dress around the hips and the quads altered to keep it from bunching up under the lace. I ordered a rose gold belt from Amazon and had that sewn to dress it up a bit. Alterations $80 total. All in $120. I ordered this because I was looking for a simple elegant dress and we can afford more and still chose this option. I received so many compliments on this dress in person and via social media. My husband was blown away. Everyone thought this was a $500-$700 dress. The manufacturer could make this a phenomenal dress with very little cost. This dress is see through because the slip is too thin - manufacturer add a better slip to the dress please. If you buy a slip get one to your ankles. The short ones you can see where it stops and starts, even in a tube slip. I finally got panty house and just used that option- use nude or white. It helped some. Manufacturer use a thicker lace around the neckline to give it some pop-not like your super sexy mermaid dress also offered here. Keep it elegant sexy. Overall, a wonderful design of the style I wore. I rarely provide reviews, but this earned it. Note: the dress snags easily. If you opt for a belt I recommend smaller vs larger option because your sleeves will catch on it more. I sent the larger belt I ordered back.

Beautiful, exactly like the photos. It’s a beautiful dress, I’m 5 feet and 125lbs (just had a baby few months ago). I’m a size 6 but I ordered an 8 because of the reviews. Velvet True Wrap Dress It’s a beautiful velvet dress that’s a true wrap dress. It has no lining inside but I believe it’s thick enough to not be see through. It does have some slight stretch BUT keep in mind that it’s a wrap dress si you want to make sure it wraps around nicely. I am 5’1 and it dragged a little behind, but nothing a little heel can’t fix. I am usually between sizing M/L I grabbed a M and it fit perfectly hugged the right curves and fell nicely over parts I wanted to hide 🫣 haha it’s a must for sure! I did wear an undershirt because I wanted a modest look and pinned the bottom so the dress wouldn’t open while dancing, walking or sitting 👍🏼 hope it helps!

Gorgeous and affordable :) It's always a gamble buying things, especially clothes , online. I was a little apprehensive because of the cheap price (under $40) but purchased this dress to attend a wedding. I was thrilled !!!! I received several compliments on my dress , it fit perfectly , and it was just gorgeous . For the price , 100% worth it. The fabric is not particularly soft or silky like you'd expect out of a higher end dress , but it definitely was not scratchy or uncomfortable . Everything I wanted in this skirt It's always a little sketchy purchasing an item that does not specify a size. I'm 5'2" 145 lbs. Size 12 in most clothing. Hour glass shape ( Busty chest, smaller waist, larger hips and ... very short legs!) This skirt was a little bit of a risk. I just was not sure it would fit. But ... it did and it still does and ... I love it!!! I dress in costume as you can probably tell from the pictures. I wanted a skirt that had drama and personality and this skirt certainly fit the bill. The elastic waist fit nicely over my size 12 hips and gathered snugly around my waist. I hafta say though ... this skirt requires it's own realestate to get round. I have to be mindful of where I'm standing and who is around me and ... going to the bathroom is quite the event! The quality is nothing too special because the material is unconventional. Washing the skirt was a little interesting because the crinoline is a trap for anything floating around in the washing machine. I would recommend washing it on delicate/gently cycle all by itself and letting it line dry. I had to fluff, reshape, pull out, adjust and remove little pieces of lint and such and I'll probably wait awhile before I wash it again. Oy!!! I'm not sure it can be ironed or pressed but it does get bunched up and wrinkled but ... it just adds to the drama and I'm okay with that. There is an inner liner to keep things discreet. It gets wrinkled too but it's hardly seen and nothing to get too upset about. The elastic is stitched in nicely. I did not experience any loose threads, or gaps in any of the stitching. It's well put together. At 5'2", the skirt falls just below my knees. For the costume that I wear, I would have preferred it a little shorter. I'm not sure it could ever be hemmed so I'm just leaving it as it is. And so ... I will close this review as a happy customer.

Comfortable Glamour It’s always fun to play “dress-ups” and be sparkly in sequins when the opportunity arises. The quality of this dress is like what one would expect from a dress shop; not a costume store. Classy and well-sewn. It is completely lined so my fat grandma arms didn’t show through the sheer, sparkly sleeves. It is also stretchy so it was comfortable and easy to move in. This is a 2X. I’m in my 60’s, weigh about 230, and 5’4” tall. The length was perfect for my height. Just above the knee. Plenty of room in the bust, and swishy on the hips. Good luck and have fun dressing to the nines!

Well-made, comfortable dress for fall with flexible fit - check the photo chart to choose your size It's so hard for me to buy dresses that fit online, some dimension is usually way off... but this one was a total winner. It is designed to allow a variety of body variations to fit each size range: stretchy, ribbed fabric; a visually defined waist but no sewn-in belt line, and even finished-edge sleeves that cuff up neatly if they're too long for your arms. I normally am a size 2, which is often an XS. This dress sizing starts with S. But the sellers have a detailed and precise size chart in the photos that accompany the listing. Look carefully at that, not the dropdown you see near the price on the main listing itself. The photo size chart is really accurate. I measured and selected the Small. I am concluding the dress may run a little small, relative to standard sizes, so check the photo chart before choosing your size! I am a slim 5'5" and prefer my dresses to hit just about at the knee. This dress lands exactly there, as the photo chart measurements promised! Sleeves were a little long, so I turned them up. Since they are well-finished, it looks fine that way. The full placket is made with real buttons and buttonholes, so you have the option of wearing the dress with a few buttons open for a more casual look. The shape is "fit and flare," which is flattering for so many women. The white contrast trim gives a cheerful and slightly sporty look to the dress (I chose navy). It is extremely comfortable, and the weight and style can work throughout the year except for hot summertime. I will wear it in business casual settings, and for slightly dressed-up concerts and events. Although it arrived a little bit wrinkled, it straightened out in a few hours and can tolerate cool ironing if really necessary. I think it will be very packable and is certainly compact and comfortable for travel. Although this is not the biggest consideration, I was pleased that it came in a recyclable and reusable sturdy plastic bag with a strong "press to zip" closure, rather than just tear-to-open single-use packaging. I will use that bag for a while when traveling, and eventually recycle it. I have not washed the dress yet. I assume it will do fine, as it is synthetic and gently machine-washable, but if there are any issues I will quickly update this review after I wash the dress. This is a dress that is likely to flatter you if you pick the right size from the photo chart, which could possibly be one size larger than your usual size! There are some lighter color choices as well as black and navy. I am very pleased.

Works for BIG boobs — insanely flattering for curvy girls! Just buy the dress. Just do it. I don’t know how this dress doesn’t have better ratings. I saw it recommended by a mid-size fashion influencer on Instagram and thought I’d give it a try, but I 100% expected to return it. I’m 5’6” and around 180 pounds. I carry a lot of weight in my stomach, hips and thighs. I have love handles and hip dips for DAYS. I am super self-conscious about my body right now as this is the most I’ve ever weighed and I hate most clothes on me. But OMG, this dress is so flattering. It makes my cleavage look BOMB, it doesn’t cling to my tummy or love handles, it’s long enough to cover all the cellulite on my thighs… it’s just *chef’s kiss*. I’m going back to order my size in every single color. Also! I’m a 34G and it’s hard for me to find things that either have enough support to wear without a bra, or enough coverage to wear a good bra under. This is PERFECT without a bra because you tie the part that goes over the boobs. You can pull it nice and tight and get amazing cleavage. I’m just absolutely obsessed. My size in clothes varies a lot, but I’m a 10-12 in jeans (L/XL in pants without number sizes) and usually M/L in shirts. I ordered an XL in this dress to be safe and it fits perfect.

I love it. This dress cut runs big, cross wrap in front looks better on smaller chests Just got the champagne in Medium. For reference I’m 5’8” and am between 152-155 lbs (haha right now at least) and I wear a 34DD/36D bra with 41” chest circumference. I have a short waist and long legs (long hip to knee, averagish calf length). This dress hits me mid calf. Some reviews said this dress ran big, I was glad I listened and sized down. I was originally gonna get a bigger size because I’m usually between a size 10 and size 12 at any given time. The imitation silk is lovely and soft. Hangs and drapes nicely. Light weight but NOT sheer. Still need to steam it though. Now the point of discontent: someone said this ain’t the dress for large tatas and I’m inclined to agree. The combo of a high neckline and the blousing and draping of the fabric across the décolletage area can make that feel like space for a billboard ad, lol. A necklace *might* help break it up, but I have yet to find one that works to do that with this dress. However, if you love this dress enough to look past that and want a good cross wrap tip, I’d suggest twisting the sash ties as you cross wrap them around your waist and tie the bow in the front rather than the back for more movement and waist definition. I’ve employed the belt loops for cinching purposes bc I’m shaped like a soup can with boobs and no butt (lol) so I need all the waist definition I can get. That being said I’m happy with it and considering the price, I’m pleasantly surprised that this dress is as good as it actually is. If you’re on the fence and would like a shiny pretty little number, get it. :)

Ladies this dress is Ah-MAZING! I seriously can’t believe it cost less than $110. I placed my order on a Sunday night and had it 2 days later. It felt like a custom made dress because the back is adjustable. I’m not small by any means and have a body that isn’t proportioned very well. I’m 5’7, 215lbs, bust 46”, waist 53 1/2, hips 49”. I ordered the 18W. I was nervous about which size to pick because I was between 2 sizes. After comparing my measurements with the sizes I went with the smaller size and so happy I did because there was plenty of room. I did purchase a sheer body suit on Amazon for $12 to add some modesty and to cover up some of my fluff. I also purchased the adjustable hoop it recommended for $20. It really doesn’t need a hoop to add fullness it needs it so you can walk without stepping on your dress. A dress like this would have cost me over $600 from David’s Bridal. It arrived in small packaging so I purchased a hand held steamer to get the wrinkles out. I also ended up purchasing a garment bag for $20 since it didn’t come with one. I didn’t buy a Strapless bra but looking at some of my other photos I probably should have since I wore the body suit underneath it moved slightly from time to time because I was moving around so much. But I would think you wouldn’t need a bra if you don’t wear a body suit or if your walking on flat ground. You will not be disappointed with your purchase at all.

Ahhhhh SO CUTE!! Ladies, this dress is absolutely amazing! I had a last minute formal event come up and I needed an affordable dress that would ship within a few days on amazon. Loads of compliments Let me start this review with the fact that I know I’m heavy and that dresses cant work miracles. That being said, I feel pretty confident wearing this dress and I get at least four compliments every time I wear it. I’m a teacher and wanted a new dress to start the year that passes the “lean over” test. I love the cut and color of this dress. The only thing I’m not crazy about is the fabric belt that comes with it. There aren’t belt loops on the dress so you don’t have to wear a belt with it. Once tied into a bow, the tails of the bow are shorter than I’d like. I thought it looked kind boring with that belt so I ordered a white, wide elastic belt that I like much better. I’m right on the cusp of 16w and 18w. I ordered the dress in a 16w first and returned it for an 18w which fits great. The bodice has a lining and the skirt of the dress does not, but it isn’t see through. I’m 5’4” and 190 lbs. if that helps with your dress decision. I am planning on ordering the same style in different colors because I like it so much.

PERFECT FIT! Most reviews said to buy this dress and I couldn't agree more! I'm 5'3", 140 lbs, 34A-B bust, and pear shaped. I bought the size Small. The "train" sits at the top of the back of my heel (around ankle length) when standing barefooted. It is a white polyester blend material, so you want to make sure you wear NUDE COLOR undergarments so not to have obvious color changes, especially in photos. A strapless bra is perfect for this dress as well. The back is a delicate zipper, not uncommon for nicer semi-formal dresses, so be careful when using it. I haven't washed it yet. Dry clean or follow the instructions on the tag carefully. When in doubt, hand wash and hang to dry. TIP: Be sure to check the sizing chart in the photos! I was at the top range of the Small and bottom range of the medium. I chose Small, especially since I know I'm losing weight. Fit is very good and will be when a few pounds are lost as well. I want to say this dress is pretty close to "true" sizing, at least for me. I'm beyond pleased with this dress! I've never ordered clothing online and really appreciate the other reviews and questions for helping me make a great decision!

The zipper though was extremely hard and kept feeling like I’d break it trying to get it to go up past the waistline. This never got smoother and hopefully doesn’t bust the seams dancing. The style was beautiful though. The sizes do run super snug though. We ordered a size 10 (which the tag says this is an XL for a size 10). She’s 140 and 5’5”. I’d suggest sizing one size up because it fit her very closely. There are built in cups in the chest so could easily be worn without a bra if needed but didn’t add a lot of padding on top of one when worn. Overall we were happy with it and she looked great.

Gorgeous, just as pictured and sizing is accurate! My 16 year old daughter wore this for Christmas. It looked lovely on her, draping just right for a comfortable, modest and yet fashionable teen. Perfect!! My 1st review 😁 Love, love, LOVE this dress! Usually a medium. 155lb, 5'6. Ordered a medium. Fits well. A bit loose in the top/shoulder area, guess that's part of the style though. The material feels so good! Dress is comfortable. Lots of compliments! Recommended. Shade of green worked for me. Would order another colors as well.

Very impressed with the quality for this price My biggest fear with an inexpensive lace dress is that the lace will look cheap, and for the price I was very impressed with the quality of the materials of this garment. As a side note, I ordered the red and the shade is very bright/fiery - a little more so than in the product photos.

Great My bust is about 38", waist 34", hips 44". An XL fits well - its stretchy so there's room to breathe/gain some pounds. A large may not have fit my hips or it would have been uncomfortably tight. The material is soft, not itchy and the zipper is easy to zip myself. It's cute and comfortable!

Fancy Tie Dye Dress My current measurements: Weight: 172 lbs Bust : 38” Waist: 30” Hips: 43” Height: 5’3” I ordered the medium green. I really love this dress. The mesh overlay is stretchy, as is the lining. So it’s not tight on my arms. And the color doesn’t seem to be lightened by the stretch. The mesh overlay hits about 2 inches above my ankles. And the lining hits about mid-calf. I am 5’3”. It hugs curves but not too much. If you want it tighter around your rump, you might want to size down. Sometimes I like these dresses to hug under my booty. But with the medium, it doesn’t scoop under. Perhaps that’s the overlay. There’s ruching around the mid section offering forgiveness. But I think the waist is satisfyingly tight. But plenty of stretch left. The only complaint I have is the neckline. The mock neck doesn’t lie exactly smooth. And it took a bit of fussing to get it folded under. If out for a night of dancing, I think it will shift and need more fidgeting. While I bothers me, I would only knock it half a star. So 4.5 stars is my rating.

Pretty, if it fits My daughter and I are looking at dresses for her summer wedding. We love the soft buttery yellow of this dress. The fabric feels high quality and flows. All the layers are nicely hemmed, not serged. Good luck in trying to fit smaller people though. Most of our wedding party are smaller people. This is a size Small, the smallest it comes, and it fits me at 5’1” and 155#. I’m 50+, and tend to wear size 8/10, medium. This seems too young of a style for me, and all the other ladies are smaller, so it’s going back.

Beautiful, but long in the torso My daughter got this dress to wear to prom. It is beautiful and well made. The lining keeps the sequins from feeling scratchy on the skin. I docked one star because the dress is very long in the torso. Admittedly, my daughter is a short 5’3”. The first 2 photos show the dress straight out of the package. You can see the excess fabric pooling on the floor. The last photo shows the dress after I altered it. An easy fix would have been to cut the desired length off the bottom and hem. But we took the more complicated alternative. We raised where the peaks of the triangle flares began. Out of the package they began just below her knees. We brought them up to begin above the knees, which also gave her more mobility at the knees so she could walk and dance more easily. This also kept the full length of the flare, which would have been shortened had we done the simple hem. Luckily I know how to sew, because I essentially recreated the bottom half of the dress. But it turned out beautifully and was still more cost effective than buying fabric and notions and making the dress from scratch. The fit around the neck, arms, and waist was good. The hidden zipper on the side is so well done we couldn’t find it at first. If you have a long torso, this dress will be perfect for you. If you have a short torso, be prepared for alterations. But it’s priced so well, even if you have to add in the cost of alterations, I feel you’ll still get a good value for your money.

My daughter looked stunning in this black dress for HOCO My daughter is 5'4" and around 125 or so. She's very busty (32/34D), but has a tiny waist, so she actually can have a hard time finding figure hugging dresses that are still somewhat modest. Her measurements didn't fit into the small (way too busty) or the medium (waist too tiny), but since reviews said it was stretchy, we took a risk and got the small. It fit like a glove. It was perfect and all 34" of her bust fit fine into the 28" small dress without popping out or being indecent. She wore 3 inch high heels and it still rested on the ground, so just be mindful that petite queens will either need it altered, wear really high heels, or be ok with it dragging. The one bummer was that the straps are really cheap and flimsy. They needed to be cinched up so much that the metal clasps were in front and visible, besides that, amazing.

Amazing dress for the price and closely identical to the photo My daughter is 5ft 10in and around 230lbs. We had the dress tailored to her measurements and chose the Dusty Rose color. It's hard to see the exact color in photos, but you can see what I think is as close to the exact color in the photo attached that's brighter and more of a pink color than the other 3 photos.I am pleasantly happy with the dress. I gave a need-by date 1 week sooner than we actually needed it by just to be on the safe side and it came 4 days before that.The material wrinkles easily, but I used a very low setting on my iron and was able to get the wrinkles out before she put the dress on. Lacing up the back was a CHORE but it turned out beautifully!One thing I didn't like about it was the flap of fabric that covers the skin where the lacing is in the back. I didn't like how grandma measured her, so I tried to offer a couple extra inches in the waist when sending measurements to the seller but it still wasn't quite wasn't enough and that fabric flap is awfully small. With the help of some shaper wear, I was only just able to get the fabric to go from one side of the lacing to the other but I'm not sure how it held up for prom/moving/dancing. She had the dress off before I got home that night. I would recommend adding more fabric there for extra security because one slight slip and her underwear would have shown in the back.Let me tell you though, this kid does NOT like dressing up. Doesn't like makeup. Doesn't like jewelry. Doesn't like dresses. But she told me at one point that she felt pretty. That's all that matters to me. I was absolutely beaming and she definitely looked gorgeous in this dress. Especially with the cascading fabric over the stomach to allow her shape appear more flattering.I definitely recommend buying this dress, and highly recommend the seller.The reason why I'm giving it 4 stars out of 5 is because of the trouble with the flap in the back being so small and unforgiving, the ease of getting wrinkles, how painstaking it is to lace the back (though that's also a bonus for a good fit so it really is hard to hate it), and the bust of the dress folding down in front. None of these things are enough to make me dislike the dress or want to send it back. We were very happy with the purchase.

Beautiful, comfortable, classy, yet casual, easy to care for! Perfect addition to a wardrobe! My first impression was, I love the material and the look. It looks great on. This dress is body form fitting. Great material for stretching and elasticity. Great material for a strong dress. Surprised how durable the material holds up when trying to put on and stretch around my curves. Can be worn with a bra if you want to conceal but if not, the dress does have a sexy look with a tight fit that is very comfortable. Could be worn at a dinner or ever party wear. Very cute. Very comfortable. Very versatile. Definitely exceeded my expectations. Sized correctly. I am 5‘4“, 170 pounds, normally wear size 12 to 14, size chart says that’s a large, sized correctly it fit great. Surprisingly dressy and casual at the same time due to the material and styling. Very comfortable, very form fitting yet very easy to get in and out of. It is fully lined to the knees, and the lining is stitched in making it easier to get in. The material is stretchy to hug every curve, and the lining does not inhibit that. Very comfortable. Non-binding, non-restrictive. Very comfortable when worn Stays in place great. I’m a 34-DD Actually stays up even with my small back yet completely non-restrictive. The rubber at the very top hold it in place yet, so does the way the breast piece is built. It feels comfortable yet stretchy enough that it should allow room for women with larger backs. The way the top is built, allows grace comfort, and coverage for any breast size, can be warm with or without a bra with full comfort. I washed and it came out great. Laundered per instructions, gentle cycle, low heat. Dress came out beautifully, no shrinkage no wrinkles, wearable right out of dryer, no ironing needed. And best of all my boyfriend loves it, just add the man’s opinion lol.

Flattering on plus-size bodies too My girlfriend bought this dress to wear to my Aunt's purple themed memorial service. She had the following to say about the dress. "This dress came in the night before the memorial service and it was the last of 4 dresses I took the chance of ordering from Amazon. It was the best option of the 4 but also just a great option in general. Dressy enough for a memorial but not so dressy that I looked out of place among the family and at the event space. It wasn't at a church, which is a good thing, because despite reading multiple reviews that told me so, it was a lot more cleavage bearing than I thought it would be. In the photos where I tried the dress on in my room, I decided to wear a bralette the next day over my bra for some modesty. Couldn't go with only a bralette because I've got too much up top for that. But somehow, the bralette made it even more pronounced (I think it was too small) but I had no time to try to wrestle it back off since I had helped set up and was speed changing before the program started. Even with the extra cleavage at a family event, I loved this dress. It is a beautiful shade of purple, more on the red side than the blue, and the material was both warm and cool. I thought it draped nicely over my belly and it is slightly high-low and I am 5'1" and wore flats (then later changed into sneakers for clean up) and it just barely touched the floor in the back. I am usually a 20W-22W or 2X in plus size clothes, 42DD. I bought a 20 plus in the plus size-velvet-short sleeve in Z-velvet plus purple. There aren't many reviews for this color in the plus size option so if you're thinking about it, here are your pictures and here is your recommendation. Buy it!"

Absolutely gorgeous! My granddaughter needed a formal gown for a High School choir event and we thought to try this gown.She is 5'4" and normally wears a comfortable 3x. The 4x fit her perfectly. It hung right at her feet. It is not clingy but flows over her body so beautifully. The entire dress is lined. There is no sparkles on it at the picture shows. Comfortable, unique, perfect! My husband and I are both ordained ministers and I bought this dress for an outdoor wedding in upstate NY this fall (we live in Wisconsin). The dress could not have been more perfect. The weight is ideal, breathable but not see-through. It is a little long but I only wore 1.5inch heels and the slit in the front allowed for me to walk easily without having to hold it up. It lays beautifully, easy to move and dance in, and the dark wine color got so many compliments! Be prepared- it definitely needs to be ironed and static guarded before wearing. I will definitely be going back to this brand for other dresses and other occasions and recommending it to friends! I’m 5’5”, 38DDD, and 185lbs and the XL fit perfectly. I might be able to pull off a Large, but I was very comfortable in the XL.

Great Dress for a Slightly Fancy Dinner My husband and I are taking a trip to WDW to celebrate our 23rd anniversary, so I wanted a dress for dinner that would be a little fancier than capris and mouse tee shirts. But not so fancy that I couldn't wear it for hours if we decided to walk around the Springs district, or at a theme park. Before we get into it... I'm 5'7", 38H, 44" waist, 49" hip. I purchased the 18w. (The 16w would not have fit nearly as well) I purchased this dress and the KRISP women's Summer V-Neck Casual Party... dress (also in purple!) to see which one would work better for me. The added bonus of Amazon free returns made it super simple. Okay, so this dress... I like this dress a lot more than the second dress I purchased. This dress is NOT a bridesmaid dress, unless you're getting married at the courthouse, or on a beach somewhere. But for what the dress IS, it's a great dress. It's a comfy jersey style fabric, like a tee-shirt. It comes to right below my kneecap, or right above where my calf starts. I think calfs (calves?) are super-sexy on a woman, so this dress hits in just the right spot for me. The empire waist and bust area fit wonderfully, which is always a bonus for those of us who are blessed with the big'uns! For our dinner date, I will wear this with my Delimira balconette bra, which pairs perfectly with this neckline. If I'm going to wear it to work, I'll wear my typical "strap those suckers down" Lilyette full coverage bra with a camisole. I didn't realize it when I purchased it, but there is a waist-tie belt attached to the dress. And it's LONG! Way too long for what it needs to be. If it were solely for tying in the back, the belt could have been 1/2 as long as it actually is. BUT, because it's so long, I can actually wrap it around my back, and bring it to the front, to tie in front, to one side (as seen in the photo). I actually liked it better that way... it looked intentional. I also love how flowy the fabric is, especially on the sleeves and the skirt. I didn't once fret about my arms when trying on this dress. And the skirt portion floats away from my apple-shaped belly; I got NO pregnancy-belly visions in this dress. I attempted to capture how much "twirl" this dress gives you. It's a horrible photo, but it works. I'm really looking forward to wearing this out to a somewhat fancy dinner at the House of Mouse with my love, and I'll probably pair with with a black "pashmina" wrap, in case it's cold in the restaurant. Lifestride Parigi Heels (as worn in the photo): Delimira Balconette Bra: Lilyette Bra: (Not worn in this photo, but a DANG good bra!)

My wedding dress My husband and I decided to elope and I needed a dress! I got a few to try on from Amazon but this one was by far my favorite. It fit me perfectly, I’m 5’4 175lbs, bust is 40G and I ordered a XXL and it fit me perfectly! It did not look or feel cheap at all. The train is short which is what I wanted, but it’s longer than the front of the dress and so pretty.

Formal and yet simple. My husband and I got married in May of this year and I needed a simple but formal dress for our small ceremony. This dress was perfect. It was lightweight and flowy. I had to add a crystal belt to dress it up more but other than that I loved it. I followed the size chart and got a large. I'm 5'6 and weigh about 176.

Cute Dress! My husband and I have an October wedding to attend; the dress code is semi-formal. I saw this dress on an influencer’s page and decided to order it. Based on reviews, I ordered the Small, which is one size up from my norm, and I am so glad I did. I am 5’3” and always struggle to find things to fit my petite frame. The length is perfect. The tummy section is snug though, so if that’s a problem area (for most women, it is), factor this into your size selection. The material is very soft. The V-neck in the back is a gorgeous detail.

SUPER GLAM My husband and I hosted a fundraiser and I bought this dress to wear with my cowboy boots since it was a "country themed" event. The dress fit me great and I felt glam in it! I am a size 24, 5'9 and the 3X fit me just fine. There's even some stretchiness to it so I would say if you are considering this dress, get it in your normal size. It's washer friendly too! (Photo is of me and my BFF)

Perfect!!! My husband and I renewed our vows and I wore this dress. It was an amazing dress! It fit like a glove! There is just enough stretch to it that I didn’t feel self conscious at all. It sits comfortably off the shoulder so I wasn’t trying to reposition the sleeves all day. There is enough fabric over the chest that I could have gone bra-less without giving everyone a show (though I chose not to)! I’ve had four children, and it shows, and I was still in love with this dress! I have a very large chest (40G-H ish) and the ladies were not busting out. I felt very classy. All in all, a very flattering and comfortable dress that I got compliments on all day!

Worked well for intended purpose My husband and I went as Pee Wee and Miss Yvonne from Pee Wee's Playhouse for Halloween this year. This was the closest thing I could find to one of Miss Yvonne's actual dresses from the show. I just added some polka dots to the white satin trim across the top to give it some color and to make it look a little more authentic. Lynn Marie Stewart (the actress that played Miss Yvonne's character on Pee Wee's Playhouse) even paied conpliment saying that I did a great job matching the dress. How cool is that?? Unfortunately I had to deduct a star from my rating because after the first wear, the loops that you weave the satin string through to create the corset back frayed and fell apart. Without the corset feature and since there's a large stretchy panel across the back, the dress is now a little too big up top. The material is soft and stretchy but it wrinkles easily and I wish that the skirt were a tad bit fuller but it was full enough that I was able to wear a petticoat underneath for some "poof". I just feel like the dress could have been better for the price. A Halloween costume would have cost me a lot more, I'm sure so I am really not complaining. I ordered the 3X. I'm 5'8" and wear an 18W jeans. I can wear some 16W dresses depending of how and what they're made of. The first photo I'm sharing is of Pee Wee and Miss Yvonne from The Playhouse set. It was the photo I used for our costume inspiration. I included a couple of closeups of the details of our actual costumes above. I hope someone finds this review !

The dress was comfortable and I'm thinking I'll wear it to our next formal event. The only reason I am giving it 4 stars is because it is extremely long. I am 5'3 & 185 lbs. I ordered the XL which it fit perfect but I did have to alter the length.
SO CUTE My husband is a teacher and we have to chaperone the highschool prom. This was perfect and was SO comfortable. I am 5’4, large chested and bought a medium. It was perfect.

BEAUTIFUL! Very Long and Roomy My husband loved me in this dress so that alone gives this dress a 5 (he is particular). The dress was a good value for the money but I did have to pay to have it professionally altered as it was 5 inches too long (I am 5’5” and wore flat heels). It was very comfortable (no itchy fabrics) and the little touches made it look and feel glam. It was roomy on top (and I am large chested). I am torn — my usual size was comfy but felt a little big overall and I would probably get a smaller size next time (especially if you are not large busted).I paired it with a silver shawl because it was a cool night, but the dress has long sleeves that are lacy and beautiful. I wore this dress to a fancy tuxedo award dinner and received many compliments.

Prettier in person. Easy to wear with unique sleeves and soft sequin shimmer. My husband ordered this dress for me. I am 5'4", pear shaped, have had 2 kids, and he got me the Pink in size M. I would not have ordered this for myself, and I rolled my eyes when I opened the package. It was pink, with sequins, and lace, and dangling sleeves - my initial thought was it would be way too gaudy. However - it is much much prettier than I expected. The sleeves are unique and eye catching and do not get in the way, like I would have thought. I like the high neckline. The pink is very pretty and the sequins do not snag and there are not too many of them. My issue with the dress is that it is not as long as I would like, as I would prefer something that covers my knees. Also, the cut of the dress is not super flattering on my pear shape, but the sleeves do help to draw the attention upward. It is an easy dress to wear, very soft, and feminine. The medium is not 'tight' per se, but even getting a larger size isn't going to have the dress suite my pear shape, in my opinion.

Made me feel like a princess My long time love and I finally decided to tie the knot. I wasn’t always plus sized, so I put off getting married literally because of embarrassment over my weight. I was pleasantly surprised by the fit of this dress being true to size (18) it was a bit long for me (as I’m only 4’10) my Mom hemmed off 10” for me and it was perfect. Couldn’t have chosen a better dress for my body type.

Super cute cut My measurements are 40 - 30 - 44, and I got a large. This dress is so cute. If you're tall like me it's gonna be a midi dress not a maxi dress which I'm okay with. I'm 5'7" with a long inseam. After trying it on and putting it on delicate cycle wash, I noticed some loose ends threads sticking out. It's not the best quality, but hopefully it lasts the summer.

Pick size carefully My measurements are 5ft 7in 155lbs 38D bust. I ordered a large. I could have gone with the XL for the bust, but I was afraid that the hip area would have been too big. I now believe that it all depends on how you want it to look on you. With this large I feel like all the lumps and bumps are on display. I think a little more room in the XL would have given me some grace in that dept. This dress is silky and slinky. I LOVE how it doesn't show your bra straps and has the sexy 'V' neck. The runching at the waist is a great addition as well. It's just my suggestion, but if you have any areas that you don't want on display.....get good shape wear and this will be perfect.

Beautiful dress! Size chart is off. My measurements matched a size 20 on their size chart. After reading reviews I decided to order a size down, 18. The 18 was a tad large in the bust and back area, but still looked beautiful. I ordered a 16 to compare and it was just a little too tight in the waist. I decided to keep the 18 and will take in the bust-line a little. The length is about an inch too long for me with 2 inch heels. For reference, I’m 5’5”, 195 lbs, 45” bust, 39.5” waist, and 48” hips. This dress is beautiful and flowy. The zipper worked great and seems to be nicely made. I wish return shipping was free considering their size chart is way off.

Cute! My measurements were 37" bust, 33" waist and I'm usually a Medium. By the sizing chart I should have ordered an XL; I got a Large and it was still a LITTLE too big. I was able to get out of the dress without unzipping it without much difficulty at all. Otherwise it's a very well-made dress. The material isn't thin and cheap like a lot of dresses you might find online, and it's very true to the pictures. Came down to about my knees overall and the lace train was beautiful!

You have to buy this dress My mom was going to an event, I searched and searched online for an outfit. This was one of the first I saw, I read the reviews and was concerned about the armpit discomfort people reported. I ordered a 6, my mom is 5’6” about 127lbs. Fit like a glove, it’s alittle long but it didn’t cause her any problems. She reported there was no discomfort in the armpit area. She has slim arms, so I think if you have arms that are alittle larger that might be the issue. The detailing on the dress, stunning. The material was so soft to the touch and high quality. This dress is a STEAL FOR THE PRICE! I paired the outfit with blue and white sapphire jewelry. If you’re considering this dress, you will not regret. The best purchase I’ve made in awhile and my mom felt like a princess.

Elegance My mother is a petite 75 years old, 4'11", about 140lbs. The medium fit her body almost perfectly. She has a narrow shoulder width, and a little waist. With the addition of a wide belt the length could be negotiated. The dress was gorgeous. She looked so elegant as an angel for halloween. The layers of the dress lay perfectly on top of a white stretch material. There is no transparency. The plan was for her to wear shimmering white hose until the temp dropped, so she wore top and bottom white thermals underneath the dress instead, but you'd never know. I'm so happy I found this dress for her. She never figitted with the fitment or adjusted it all night. She was completely comfortable in it. PROBABLY the BEST Amazon CLOTHING purchases I've ever made!
Stunning My mother was absolutely beautiful. The picture does no justice. It dit true to size, she is wearing an XL & she is is 5'2".

So beautiful dresses! My neices wedding. Everyone I have shown this outfit to they love it! It fits me perfect. I'm 5'3and weigh 106lbs...I think this outfit would look good on anyone and be perfect for any formal event!

Very flattering! My new favorite dress! I've bought this now in 2 different colors for 2 different weddings. The fabric is very nice- I had no issues with anything being see through, even on the white/blue pattern. I'm 5'8" and the dress hits right at my ankles. The waist is a little loose but it hangs nicely so it doesn't look baggy. It shows off curves without being clingy. Definitely a good buy!

Looooooove!!! My only complaint is why did i wait so long to buy these! They are so so comfortable with plenty of give in all the right places. Im 5’8” 154 and i got the 8 long because i like to wear shoes/boots with an inch or 2 of heel. I fo prefer less of a boot cut and more straight leg but these are really nice. Cant recommend enough

A lot of fabric underneath My only complaint with this dress is the material underneath is used in an excess amount Its really smooth so it would get caught on my undergarments and would roll itself out and I'd have to keep tucking the under material in It is darker than pictured I thought it'd be more pastel colored- it's more of a sage I like it either way. It gave a little stretch but not much I felt it future fairly well despite the materials used. I'm 5'7, 220lb and large chest and the XL fit me fine in all the places I needed it to and super happy is actually knee length!!! I'll be keeping the dress its really cute

Great fit and color My only criticism is that the slit is kinda high, I have to sometimes hold it closed on windy days while walking. The fit is great, it’s comfortable, and holds wrinkles well. I had to steam it when it came in due to packaging but after washing I hang to dry and it doesn’t need steamed at all. I wore this for family pictures and it was a great dress that complimented the color scheme of light greens and blues with tans. I added a belt to mine but it looks just as good without it. I ordered a medium which is my usual size and it fit great. It held me in enough to not need a bra and has a good amount of stretch. For reference I am a 34DDD.

I had my son 9 months ago and I'm a little self conscious about my tummy. The wrap around the waist made me feel comfortable and accentuated the slimmer part of my torso. The fabric was just thick enough to keep me warm in chilly bay area weather. Overall a wonderful dress.

Buy it! A++ My only wish is there was a zipper so I don’t have to peel it on or off or it stretched just a little bit more to help. But it’s a wonderful dress! Looks exactly like the picture. I bought a small. To give perspective: I’m 5’4”, 130lbs. I consider myself a “medium” frame since my bra size is 36B (with deflated boobies 😣) but I do often wear a size small for many pieces of clothing since medium is loose for me, now. But! The dress fits like a glove and was exactly what I wanted. Even more cool, since the fabric is velvet and cinched, no need for a body shaper to hold loose skin in place! (Have lost a lot of weight.) Dress camouflages it exactly right. Huge win!

Incredible Quality for last minute Amazon dress! My personal measurements: I am 5’8 and between 130-135 lbs My bust is either 32C or a 34A (professionally measured) Waist/torso is between 24-26inch. Current traditional US sizing for me has ranged from 2-4. My biggest issue is that I’m in between sizes right now. I would have ordered this dress in a size 2 if it would have come in time, but I had to order a size 4 and then get it tailored to fit my waist a little better. I wore very high formal heels which did cut the dress off leaving a few inches off the floor, but not to the point of an uncomfortable and awkward length. I received many compliments all evening! I tried to share as many pictures just to show the quality of the dress and the sequins in the fabric in different lighting! The bodice and the skirt are not see-through, and were very stretchy/thick and comfortable material giving everything a surprisingly a high end feel. I personally added inserts to show I had some sort of cleavage due to having a very small bust. This dress already has padding inside, so if you have a larger bust be aware you WILL be showing a lot of cleavage! (Again, please be mindful, what you see pictured is a size 4 dress that has been professionally taken in around the torso to fit my smaller waist)

In my opinion it ran small My regular size is a XL/16 I’m 5’6” It’s imported to mention I ordered a size XL and it was snug from the butt area and belly area. my bellybutton area looked marked, so I decided to order a XXL and try that one out. That one worked out for me (other than the armpit area. That was a littttlleee big. So I did some work to that. After that it was perfect! I loved this dress and received so many compliments on it!!!

Extremely Flattering! My shapewear showed a bit in the abdomen however this dress is so lovely! Very flattering , comfortable. I am 5’0 150lbs and ordered a medium and I’m glad I did. It fits like a glove and hugs all the curves 😍

Well made! Not best fit for flat girlies My size: 5'4, 145 lbs, some hips, small boobs! I'm moderately curvy, most of my length is my legs, and I don't have quite enough to fill out this dress so it isn't super flattering in the center on my frame. Additionally, it's very chunky in the neck, which makes it less flattering for smaller frames as well, it felt like it was dominating me. However, out of pure laziness to make it work so I didn't have to return it, I flipped the dress and wore it backwards. I like it better that way! High neck, removed issue of chunky swoop neck. I wasn't enamored with the fit in the middle still, and didn't really want to plan on wearing it backwards, so I did return it. Positives: This is so well made. It is worth roughly $55-60 in my mind, I got it on sale for about $40 so I certainly felt it was worth that. The fabric is thick and dual layered like you'd expect a dress to be, the sequins are well-attached, high quality, and evenly spaced. The zipper feels like you'd hope, and zips low enough you don't have to squeeze in there. Bottom line: if you're curvy, this will likely be a good fit for you! If you're smaller, and ok with a little extra room in the center and a bigger statement neck, it'll work for you, too.

Buy this dress! My son's elementary school hosted a formal sneaker ball. I came to Amazon looking for something super elegant and appropriate to wear around elementary xholdreb but I'm still the "hot single mom" lol. This dress was PERFECT! It looked a mottled matronly in the pic but to my surprise was the perfect touch! I got size M and I am 5'2" 147lbs and curvy. The M fit perfectly and to my surprise did nit need to be hemmed!!!!
Beautiful dress! My weight is 137 pounds and my height is 5’2”. This beautiful green dress was a perfect fit in small size. Comfortable, simple and elegant. Just what I need!

Dress so great we got two of them My wife actually got this same dress in burgonay red and liked it so much, we got a second version of it in black .The dress fits her perfectly, at 110lbs & 5'4". Nothing is overly tight or loose and the adjustable straps at the shoulder help secure a good fit. The fabric is airy and flows well . Definitely a pretty dress for a night out or party.

Beautiful dress My wife bought this dress. She first ordered a medium and it was too large. She sent it back and got refunded quickly. Then she reordered a size small. Both orders arrived quickly. You can use a steamer to remove wrinkles. She weighs 122 pounds a small fit perfectly. She would definitely order more dresses in different styles.

Perfect purchase! Good quality and pretty nice! My wife bought this her upcoming luau party. She was hesitant to purchase at first but found this dress very nice when she received it! Dress Strong On Value & Style My wife really likes her JASAMBAC dress. We ordered a Medium 10 in Wine Red for her. She usually orders a medium and it fits true to size except for the chest which I'll address later in the review. My wife loves the color and likes the wrap around style because it helps hide tummy rolls. The material is stretchy and comfortable. She says she could wear this dress all night long. The reason it gets dinged a star is the fit up top. Ladies with a larger bustline will have issues fitting into this dress. My wife says it feels too tight up top, perhaps due to the cut of the dress. My wife is 4' 11" and this dress was a little long for her. She had to hem it up about 2 inches and she made an adjustment to the top, again due to her height, not due to the fitment up top. Making these types of adjustments is not unusual for her due to her height, we just wanted full disclosure because the photos were taken after adjustment. This dress has a very strong value proposition with a lot of style and quality for the price. If you're not big up top, my wife highly recommends it.

Great Dress! AWESOME Customer Service!! Not only is this dress classically beautiful, it’s incredibly comfortable compared to most truly formal evening wear. I think I could’ve gotten a size smaller, which would’ve been my usual size, but sizing up one size that was based on my measurements, probably made dancing, raising my arms, etc. easier and possibly cooler. It has a little stretch too. Be aware the waistband will likely land above your natural waistline. It’s on the border of an empire waist. The length was good to go for me with kitten heels, and with higher platform heels, an inch or two off the ground. I’m 5’7”. If you use your actual measurements, it’s going to be perfect. That said, I initially blew it, because I looked at so many dresses, and I ordered the wrong size based on a size chart on another dress by the same maker. That wouldn’t have been a big deal, but it was for a wedding I had to travel to, and leave for sooner than the delivery window of the replacement dress in the correct size. I messaged the seller to see if I could pay for overnight shipping or something, and they got back to me first thing the next morning. They expedited shipping it from their location, and even followed up again the next day with an updated delivery target, with no change in shipping charges. I ended up receiving it days before we had to leave. It was such a relief, and I could not be more grateful. I will always check this seller’s shop when I need something in the future. They went above and beyond for me!! I cannot say enough good things about this seller and the dress. You will not be disappointed.

Well-Made and Comfortable! NOTE: I am a member of the Amazon Vine Program. I try out new products, and then provide an honest, unbiased review, based on my personal impressions and experience. I am not paid for my reviews.I own several PrettyGarden dresses, and PG has become one of my favorite quality brands on Amazon. This is a lovely dress that can easily be dressed up or down with different accessories. The polyester fabric is lightweight, but not sheer, and it has a great breezy flow to it. The oversized Swiss dot pattern of the fabric is a unique styling detail that I really like. I usually order a size up because I have a large bustline, and I was worried that the style of this bodice would be too tight on me, but I'm happy to say it is not and the size Large has been very comfortable to wear and move around in. This dress is well-made with tight stitching and serged seams. I'm about 5'5", and the near-ankle length is what I expected. It's a nice-quality dress that comfortable and flattering to my curves. Great addition to my wardrobe!

Perfect wedding guest dress for my fellow preggo ladies. I'm pretty busy and felt like I had good coverage. I will likely wear this dress again when not pregnant and I'm sure I'll still be satisfied!

Durable dress…washes well on gentle cycle Now, this is an interesting dress…it has adjustable ties on the shoulders…it’s not a permanent knot or bow, but it can be sewn into place so it wouldn’t have to be tied every time it’s worn. It fits true to size, I wear a L/XL, so I ordered the XL when I saw the split and size chart. The fabric is soft and medium weight…it’s not see-through, but will show every bump and valley!:) I love how the bodice has that vintage look, giving a smoother sleek look with a slightly full/flared skirt. For reference: 38D(41”), 35” waist, 46”/47” hips It’s also durable…in the photo, I’m wearing the dress after it’s been washed…it held up well, barely wrinkled, no shrinkage, no lint nor negative changes to the fabric. I dried it on extra low. This apricot (more of an ivory) dress is a good find and nice fit. I recommend it.

It's OK Obsessed with the teal color but not so much the fit on the top. I'm a large with a bust of about 36DDD and so of course the photo for this dress is more flattering than it was on me I think. Looks good with a slightly angled mirror but once I stood in front of a bathroom mirror it wasn't as nice. also super hard to tie the bow in the back but that just may be me

Tons of Complements Occasion: Wedding My Parameters: 5'7", 195lbs, Large Bust The dress came folded up in a small bag, so it needed to be ironed - that's standard with most Amazon dress orders though. The dress fit snuggly but not bad enough to where I couldn't sit down or dance like there's no tomorrow. The chest was extremely tight, that's why I only gave it 4 stars. There wasn't a ton of room for my ladies so I needed to really stuff them in. Next time I'll order a size up and alter the dress to allow for more room up top. I did wear spanks, but honestly it didn't need it, even though it is a more form fitting dress. Overall, despite the snug bust, the dress was comfortable all night. I don't recommend wearing super high heels with this dress unless your shorter. The dress was almost too short, but the heels I wore were smaller so it wasn't too bad for me. I expected sparkles to be everywhere, but I didn't have any issues. Only a few green sparkles were lost and that was only when I was taking it out of the bag after delivery. The dress didn't smell either right out of the bag. I got a TON of complements on this dress. I highly recommend if you want a vine or poison ivy look for a party/wedding.

So cute Of every ruched mini dress I’ve ever tried, this may be my favorite. I’m 5’5, 115lbs, 24” waist, 36” hips and I ordered XS per their size chart, it fits perfectly. I have hip dips, and usually mini bodycons really accentuate them, where this one kind of hides them (they’re still noticeable but not nearly as much as in most minis) It’s also compressive but not restrictive. The least amount of stretch is in the waist, so it takes some effort to get it on over your head, but I like the snatched waist. The sleeves and bottom section are the most stretchy, so walking and moving your arms is nice and comfy Nice, double lined fabric

Avoid this dress like the plague that it is Oh boy. I don’t know what was worse: the stegosaurus-like humps that the wacky zipper created in the fabric up the middle of my back; the way the fabric clung in ALL the wrong places, showing every single bump on my body that a dress of this cut would normally hide, making for an extremely unflattering fit; the itchy fabric of the bodice and sleeves that made me feel like I was going to have an anxiety attack if I had to wear it a moment longer; the way the arm fabric kept snagging on the bodice and all the loose threads that looked like a disgusting spider web hanging from my armpits as a result, or the uneven waist band, the sash of which seemed to be sewn into a kink! All this after the ten minutes I wore it while trying it on!! The sequins on the bodice are very, very sparse and poorly sewn…a couple dozen fell off just from trying it on. They’re sewn onto this weird, fragile metallic mesh fabric, which, in turn, is sewn onto what appears to be tulle (the tulle part is what’s against your skin, making it extremely itchy). The top of the bodice is sheer (just the super thin metallic mesh) but there’s a piece of fabric under it covering the bust area. The sheer chiffon-like overskirt covers the underskirt which is made of cheap Halloween costume quality spandex/Lycra, so the static-cling factor is astronomical. The zipper is extremely tiny and fragile (again, think super cheap Halloween costume quality…even though the dress has ample room in the bodice, and comes together easily in the back with overlap and room to spare, my husband couldn’t even get the zipper to work without breaking it, so I had to zip it up and put it on over my head like a shirt just to get it on…not sure how this is going to work after having hair and makeup professionally done for an event ). It’s extremely long, too…a good six inches too long for me (I’m 5’2). The seamstress wouldn’t touch it because she said the material is too cheap and flimsy to be able to hem it correctly. That’s never a good thing. This is a $30 max value dress. There’s no way this thing is worth the nearly $70 price I paid for it! I ordered two sizes up in order to make sure it fit, and I’m glad I did, because like others have said, it runs small! Oddly enough, even though there was plenty of room in the waist and bodice, it was still a tad snug in the arms, but tolerable. I look disgusting in this dress and feel gross in it, too. It feels like Im wearing a cheap, itchy Halloween costume. Just…this dress is a hot mess. I’ll be sending it back!

This is the perfect summer dress and it is definitely coming with me on my beach vacay in September!

BUY THIS DRESS! Ok I never ever leave reviews but I needed to because this dress is just so good. It feels super silky and comfortable. Absolutely perfect!!! Ok please excuse my dirty ass mirror! But I wanted to brag about how great this dress is. Dress is beautiful. Top is sturdy but not stiff and skirt portion was the perfect length for some heels. I am 140lbs and 5'6", wear a size 7 jeans- I purchased a medium. The top is see through so you decide if you want to be covered (wear a tank top underneath) or be risky. I wore mine with a strappy bra, it looked stunning. You don't notice the slits down the sides unless walking or dancing. Only tip I give is buy it early and let it hang to get the wrinkles out.

Good but… Ok so I do think this dress is beautiful, doesn’t wrinkle, and the fabric does not feel cheap but there are a few things I must let you know. First, i wasn’t sure what size I needed so I ordered both the XS in which my measurements fell into and a Small. Even though the XS fit, I went with the small as in the photo for two reasons. One, I have a bigger chest and needed more coverage up top but secondly, like another reviewer said… the side zipper puckers and it did not lay flat on the XS. By going up a size, it seemed to lay more nicely and not pucker as much. Second thing to consider, these dresses are meant to be midi length and being 5’2, I liked that. However, the length was not the same on the XS versus the small. The XS fit more like a midi falling to above my ankles while the small was almost to the floor. So there is some length difference between each dress made. Also, I noticed that the hem is cut differently on each. The hem on the xs was fine and was the same all the way around but the hem on the small was cut wrong. The front was actually longer than the back which if someone was paying attention or you were standing for long periods, someone would notice. I was in a time crunch and since my event was mostly sitting, I wore it anyway but just something to consider and at this price I may even order more than one in case you get a “lemon”. I’m sure it is not the same on every dress but you get what you pay for and there may be a few faults.

It can get the job done Ok so last Wednesday we decided that we would get married in Vegas on that Saturday (it’s complicated). We already have a wedding planner this year out of the country so we didn’t tell a soul. I bought this dress, bridal belt and shoes from Amazon that was delivered on Friday. My review.. I’m 5’4” and 153lbs, most of my weight is in my bottom half lol. I ordered a medium which fit very well. The dress has some serious stretch to it where it could fit someone larger however it is a thin material that is unforgiving. The dress will show every curve or roll or serious dimple you have. I wore a thong shape wear under the dress but BABYYY before I put it on, my little rolls were on full display. No you were not able to see my shapewear through the dress. It’s also pretty long, the shoes were about 2.5-3inch heels and you can see how the dress still dragged on the ground. As other reviewers mention, the top of the dress is just weird/cheap. On if the pictures I included you can see how it started folding back a little. I honestly hated how the top looked because it wouldn’t let my breast be great. I wanted cleavage ladies!!! Anyway the bridal belt set it off and I received many many compliments. Overall I would say, depending on what you need the dress for, it can pull it off. If you have time and money to buy elsewhere…do it. I gave 4 stars because you get what you pay for, it’s silly to expect a perfect little dress at this price point. I don’t regret my decision on this dress. I had my little wedding and I didn’t look a mess or have to wear one of my regular sundresses. I hope this genuinely helps someone :-)

SHOW STOPPING EMMY DRESS OK, ladies, I have to preface this by saying that I never look good in dresses, and my body is like three different sizes. I've never ordered a dress online that has fit me. I don't mean to name-drop, but I'm going to. I wore this dress to the Emmys, and I had Katherine Heigl, and other major celebrities coming up to me, complimenting my dress. I've never felt so hot before. This dress fit like a glove. I am 5'3" and probably 155 pounds, with double D boobs. It was slightly big since I bought a large, but it made me feel comfortable and I could move. If you grabbed the fabric and pulled it, it would stretch back, probably about a fistful. If you like a skin-tight feel, then definitely go for a medium, but the large works for me. It is a showstopper, elegant, and if you don't buy this dress right now, you are a gosh darn fool, ladies. I promise you, you will feel so sexy. Also, I'd like to add that I'm very conservative, and I seldom show cleavage. This dress showed a little bit more than I was comfortable with, but it wasn't awful. My biggest problem was that my boob tape wasn't holding and kept falling off. Get this dress!

20 STARS!!! DANG I look GOOD and Now I must find someone to take me somewhere! OMG I am SO THRILLED with this dress!!! I got the Navy Blue in a Small and it is hard to photograph a dark garment and do justice to this dress...it TRULY looks as Fantastic as shown in the product description photos. I am 5'3", 130lbs, 36" bust, 30" waist and 40" hips and after looking at other reviews I chose the Small because sometimes if you are short, a size up means the waist doesn't hit you in the right place. The Small is PERFECT on me! It is not tight anywhere. I don't have any shape wear on in these photos but some light shape wear would be good but not totally needed as style and fabric is very forgiving. I used some bathing suit top inserts and I will use some fashion tape to keep them in place so before you go out and buy a strapless bra try that. It does gape just a bit under my arm opposite the strap side. Also, those bra inserts fill out the top which is a bit too big on me without them. So this dress will work well if you are bustier than me. If you are unsure of size I would size down as this has a nice amount of stretch. The opening in the front comes up just barely above my knees, so it's sexy but still ELEGANT. I am wearing it with 4" heels and the length on me is PERFECT! The quality is EXCELLENT for this price ($52.00 as of this review) and it is finished very nicely, the poly crepe has a nice substance to it and flows and moves beautifully. In my opinion, this is a four season dress depending on the color you choose. I did not iron or steam it before trying on for these photos, it arrived with very few wrinkles that I will easily be able to steam out. This dress would pack and travel well! This Navy is a nice dark Navy color. I am 60 years old and I think just about any age can wear this and feel like a Million Bucks! Comfortable, too! This dress would be excellent for any kind of holiday party, would make a lovely bridesmaid's or maid of honor dress, wonderful for a college formal and if you are the significant other of someone in the military this dress in black or navy for a military formal event would be STUNNING! RUN do NOT walk and get this dress!!! TRULY LOVELY!

I’m usually a medium in dressed but I sized up to a large based on the size chart. I don’t think I could have sized down since I needed the room on top to zip my boobs into this thing. On the plus side, the crepe fabric is very nice and the zipper closure is well made. The dress doesn’t feel cheap so maybe on a super tall slim girl this would look amazing but it just didn’t flatter my 5’5” 145lb frame at all.

Fabulous fit, quality and price! Omg, I am buying this dress in every single color! I feel like I should be on an episode of Mad Men channeling my inner Joan Holloway! Such a fabulous fit and classic style...I am in LOVE. I got so many compliments at work wearing this dress...in fact, 3 of my co-workers will be ordering it this week, LOL! For the record, I am 5’ fall, have a 28” waist and am about 127 lbs. for reference. This dress is made of substantial, slightly stiff material that hugs you in all the right places yet doesn’t “cling” to problem spots too much. It has a good amount of stretch to it as well. I used to spend over $100 for Bettie Page dresses when they used to be around and this is the closest I will ever find to that kind of quality. I probably could've gone with a small, however, since I plan on wearing it in a corporate environment, I didn't want it to be too tight. It comes with a matching skinny belt which I chose to wear high on my waist. Perfection! I can’t wait to order more. Super fast shipping too! THANK YOU!

Very nice for the price! On a whim my husband & decided to get married & had less than three weeks to plan. I ordered this dress as well as several others & this was the only one that was perfect for what I needed! I ordered a small despite my measurements for the waist matching the medium size. My bust matched the small & I was afraid the medium would be too big. It was a tighter fit but not to where I was uncomfortable & couldn’t breathe. The dress was a tolerable length, I’m 5’6”. It was the only dress that didn’t drag on the ground but it was a bit shorter, I wore heels & my shoes showed. It was pretty wrinkled but I was able to steam it. During the process of steaming the skirt I did notice a snag, it was not super noticeable. For the price I felt it was a beautiful dress. And I got many compliments.

Great dress that fits all different body types very well. One of the really nice things about this dress is, there's a lot of give to it. What I'm noticing also, is it works well with different chest sizes. You can see my 20 yr old daughter, who is 5'6" and a strong athletic 155 pound build with a smaller chest, looks great in this dress. The red one - which actually looks like a brighter red in person than in the product description pictures for the red one. Fav feature: stretch waistband Ordered a size large. I am 5’5; usually a small or medium if long-sleeve and tight in tops, and a large in bottoms. The large is a bit too big in shoulders and sleeve length, but hemming can make it work for me. My favorite feature is the back, stretch-waistband in the pants. I usually have difficulty with pants since I have a smaller waist. Pants will either gap in my waist, or will be too tight when I sit. This band resolves both of those issues, which is why it gets 5 stars from me! Pockets on both the pants and blazer are functional (not fake!), as well as deep, which is always a plus. Material and stitching are both good quality. It does have wrinkles when taken out of the packaging, both otherwise all good quality. I’d say, overall, this is a great set. It is something versatile that can be dressed up or down, and will be something that will last long with proper care. Price ($57 at the time of this review) is reasonable considering the quality and how long the product should last, in my opinion.

Absolutely stunning Orders size down! I wish I had gone one size down from what I ordered because the corset style is VERY forgiving and you can adjust it to fit your shape. And the cover part underneath is plenty wide enough so you won't show skun OR you could remove it and show your skin. Up to you! This dress is so flattering. I have a wide middle section these days but this dress was gorgeous the way it was shaped at the ribs. I'm 5"10" and 205lbs with a 40D cup and it really looked amazing. I always have an issue with dresses being too short but I was able tobwear heels and be very happy with the length. However - if my boobs were any smaller it would have probably been an issue with them gapping because the bust is formed cups. The straps are adjustable but that will only get you so far. You will not regret buying this dress for your next fancy outing. I steamed it after it arrived and it looked like I should have spent hundreds on this dress.

Dress is very yellow Originally bought this in champagne to be a bridesmaid in my friends wedding but upon arrival the top and bottom are two different tones and it is way more yellow. The fit was a little short (I'm 5'1')and material was fine, if a little scratchy. Probably would have kept it had it been the correct color, but there are also much better options available.

Very slimming and flattering Originally ordered a medium in black which fit but a little snug in the chest (36D). Ordered the large in black for a more comfortable fit. Light weight for wearing to a funeral in this texas heat but not see through. Also good length for church. (5'0") Received many compliments!!

Pretty dress but a little large in bust Originally ordered in a medium , but the chest was huge and I'm a 34C/D. I reordered in a small . This helped alot, but is pretty fitting in waist and hips. Goddess Dress Other than needing to pin to hide cleavage this is an amazing dress. Very forgiving and flattering. Currently 5’8 173lbs and a size 10 was perfect.

Granddaughter loves this dress! Our 22 year old granddaughter just loves this mini-bubble skirt dress! The dress is made well and just looks awesome on her! Perfect for summer, just pair it with some heels or sandals and you are all set! I would highly recommend this dress!

Loved it Out of all the mermaid dresses I’ve came across on Amazon this one seemed to be the best and I wasn’t wrong! I was sad it didn’t have straps because I knew I’d have to have a dress with straps but with the price of the dress being so great I figured I’d be able to add the straps with a seamstress. It’s such a beautiful dress and looks so great, like it came from a high end store! I felt so beautiful and loved the fact that it was a tie up back, knowing that I wanted to be able to control the fit of the dress on how tight I’d want it, it was perfect and exactly what I wanted. Again because it didn’t have strap I had the straps added to it and it came out great and I felt so much better with the straps being added. My breasts are larger than most, my size is 38 DD/DDD (150lbs) depending on what brand I wear and I knew with a strapless bra I’d be uncomfortable and I wasn’t wrong, initially without the straps the dress kept falling and kind of caving into my stomach covering the upper held of my torso. So if you do have larger breasts and plan on getting this dress please know you would probably have to add straps to it, to be more comfortable. I am pretty short, 5’2”, and was worried the dress would be too long but it wasn’t overwhelming long to where I’d have to get it fixed. I loved to train and although it was longer than it was probably supposed to be for the fit, I liked how it looked and felt. Not all dresses are going to fit perfectly without altering it, so I would say get this dress and make the proper alternating you need to fit YOU perfectly!

100% satisfaction. Happy tears. Outstanding, just simply unbelievable for the price. I cried as soon as I put it on. It is absolutely beautiful. I cannot believe I spent under $100 on my dream dress. I'm 5-5 154 lb. 36C chest. I bought a size 12 and when it's tight end to the max it fits absolutely beautifully. I will update once I actually have the wedding my photos are just trying on the dress. Gorgeous dress! ove this dress. I’m 5’1 about 180 hips and buns. Def recommend I got a large. Beautiful color and very nice material. Dress def was a show stopper. I wore it to a wedding. Runs big | pretty dress Overall a nice dress, good material, and didn’t feel cheap. The crinkle material could potential hide anything too. The dress was too short and big for me. I’m 5”11 6’ though so not super tall girl friendly. I’m inbetween a small and medium on dresses typically and this medium was wayyy too big on me. Even if mediums are slightly big on me it’s still fine or just big on top. This was practically a flowly baggy dress on me which I don’t believe is the intended fit. So if you’re in between sizes- size down or if you’re wanting a more fitted look.

Overall a very beautiful dress that I will be purchasing more of in different colors! There's only a few negative things I can think of: - A little sheer where it fits tight (bust and back rolls for me, but not too see through that it cant be worn) - Needs a second person to zip up (though I could've given up too easily I'll admit) - Has to be hand washed Otherwise I cannot recommend this dress enough!! So flattering and comfy! Also if it helps anyone, I'm 5'9 about 200-210 lbs, purchased a 12 and it fits great!

Great dress but very long Overall I like the dress, it’s very comfy and stretchy, and I like how the end kind of flares out. However, it is VERY long. I’m 5’1 and I had to get the dress cut by a tailor. That’s why it looks that height on me. Also if you sweat a lot or wear non seamless underwear it will show through the dress.

Straps not adjustable Overall I like the dress. I am about 175 pounds, 5’3.5”, with a large bust 36H. I had to order up to make sure my boobs would fit which resulted in the dress being very loose on the body. This is normal for me so I use a wide belt to define my waist. The top is very snug so I used a shrug to cover where I was unable to adjust the straps. They are sewn in place. I haven’t looked it over yet, but may be able to remove the stitches holding it in place and adjust. It is long on me as I am short and I paired it with 5” wedges. Love the pockets and the slit. If your boobs aren't too big it should fit you well. For scale, I typically wear a medium or large women’s shirt and an 8 in pants. In dresses I always get At least an x-large as my bust is 46 inches.

Very Nice for the Price Point Overall I like this dress and I think I will get some use out of it during the colder months. The purple is a beautiful, rich, jewel tone. The fabric is a little heavy, like someone else mentioned, almost like a swimsuit fabric. For me, it would be way to hot to wear it until it is literally cold outside. I am 5' 6" and very curvy. I absolutely love that with this snap done at the bust it covers me well, showing no cleavage, without looking matronly. It just hits the floor when I'm standing, so I will either need heels or to hem it. The one thing I really didn't like was the double elastic band in the back. It sinches together and accentuate back fat that I otherwise don't even notice on myself. I think this will be great for traveling or what I need something a little dressy but conservative.

I wouldn’t wear it out other than a costume. It’s a little loose in the chest on me and long but with heels I can make it work. I think it could easily be adjusted though! Overall flattering throughout hip and midsection Overall the dress was flattering throughout hip and midsection. Based off of several reviews I read. I ended up ordering a large. I'm wondering if I should have gotten a medium. I'm 5'6,167 lb, 34D, waist is roughly 29-31in depending on bloating, eating, etc. I tried the dress on without anything underneath. For the most part it did smooth over the hip dips I unfortunately have. However there was a lot of gapping at the top. It also made my boobs look smaller than they are. In the pictures attached to my review. I have a strapless bra on and I also have Spanx underneath. The Spanx did help accentuate my waistline and smooth out the hip dips. The problem was that there was a muffin top rule where the spanks sat at my waist line that was highlighted prominently in the back of the dress. Along with the lines from my strapless bra. The other thing I didn't like was that the elastic band seemed to be a little too loose. Again I don't think it's any fault to the dress. I think it's just my body type in the dress. I'm considering sizing down due to how stretchy it is. I hope that it might fix the issue of needing Spanx and the strapless bra.
