Elegant dress that wraps around you and let you show your shoes. The Miusol Elegant V Neck Ruffle Style Formal Dress is an easy-to-wear dress that enhances your appearance. It features a V-neckline, without sleeves and just covers the top of your shoulders. The high-low hemline allows to show off your shoes. The wavily ruffle cascade from the upper leg on one side to the ankle on the opposite leg and wraps around both legs on the back. Make sure you are able to fill the bust area (small size / 34DD >), since it is a bit looser than on the photo in the description and even the button won't help. For better results use a steamer instead of an iron. This is a graceful dress to wear at a wedding, date night and dressy party. It enhances your curves and figure without constricting you, which make this dress easy to wear.

Love Pockets The moms out there should know first and foremost, this dress has pockets! I think we take for granted pockets until we are mothers and it never fails, we’re out somewhere without our purse and inevitably need a tissue for our kid. The quality of the dress itself is seemingly very nice. It’s heavy in a good sense without being overwhelming. It has a liner under the skirt and up at the bodice so it’s not see-through. I am 5‘4“ tall 128 pounds and this hits me midcalf. I bought a size small and there is still a good bit of stretch in the waist. These pictures were taken right out of the bag so it’s definitely wrinkled and needs to be steamed. But overall, I’m very excited to potentially wear this for family pictures in the fall. For this price point, I don’t think that you can go wrong and would definitely recommend it.

Multicolor Pink is a Somewhat Dusty Rose/Coral and Print was not Flattering The multicolor pink is not my cup of tea. It is more drab than I expected from the pictures. I took a photo with a Sherwin Williams paint deck to help others get an accurate idea of the color. It is between Sherwin Williams colors SW6317, SW6318, SW6324, SW25 -- dusty rose/dusty coral color. In my opinion print on the blouse gave it a kind of "granny" look. I am 5'8 and 162 lb and usually wear 8 -10. I bought a large. It was comfortable and fit across my shoulders, bust and arms. However, blouse is quite full across the waist, and the horizontal nature of the print across the bottom made my midsection look extra wide. I am returning the blouse for this reason. I also bought this blouse in a more subtle blue pattern in the same size that I am keeping because it doesn't visually broaden my waist like this print did. I think this design might look better on a more slender person who likes muted, dusty colors.

Pretty cute dress The navy is a true dark navy unlike the grayer shade of navy the product pictures suggest. There are 2 things I don't really care for in this dress, but as others have said to size up, maybe that would fix the issues. The first is the back of the dress, the material looks like neoprene (like a wetsuit) and my short torso doesn't help matters because the zipper bunches. The other thing is the way the sleeves sit, there's an odd gap in one side because it flares out. The material is thicker than I thought it would be, but it's not uncomfortable. For reference, my measurements are 36/28/42 and I am 5'3".

Great dress over all! Stretchy and flattering The neckline is definitely a deep V, for me it went all the way to the bottom of my bra, so I just tied it tighter to cover a little more. I opted for a medium because i’m short and knew it was a true tie dress and it worked perfect. Longest part of it hit at right about my ankle (i’m 5’3”). Material is stretchy and a nice velvet, got lots of compliments, especially on the color!!
Love the neckline! The neckline is very fun! On a whole, it’s a tighter fabric, but I went a size up and I think I looks ok. You can dress it up or down. For reference: 5’6” and around 155 lb.

PSA: get this dress if you have mom bod or have been struggling to hide your tummy The nitty gritty: my current weight 142 lbs. height 5’2”. Bra: 34 B full cup (could also wear 34C demi-cup). Small of waist 30”, widest girth across belly button 39”. I purchase 2 different colors of this dress style in Medium based on my bust and the measurement for the small of my waist. This dress has a higher crew neckline (no risk of spillage and is cut so that it’s flattering for smaller bust too. The skirt portion is a fit and flare style that hugs your back and flares out at the top and not at the hips. This is important if you have a postpartum mom belly or stubborn belly fat that just won’t go away like me. Many of the fit and flair dresses I have purchased/tried on flair out at the side of the hips so I look very pregnant (and I’m not). Since this dress flairs out at the top of the hips (not the side) it hides my mom belly nicely giving me a feminine shape. In one of the side pics, I placed my hands under my belly to show how bloated I can get after eating so you can see that with this dress no one else can tell I have this bloated mom belly. I usually do a sit-down test on the dresses I try on to see 1) how comfortable it is while sitting, 2) does it accentuate my bloated belly, and 3) if it rides up all weird on my legs. This dress style passes the test with flying colors. This dress is made to accommodate those with longer torsos, so it bunches up a bit in the back (as seen in photo). But it’s not a big deal to me; usually I have a bolero shrug (seen in pic) on anyways since many places blasts the AC and I get chilly easily. I feel this dress shape can easily be worn for casual or dressier occasions. The top part of the dress is lined, but the lower half is not lined. The cloth material has a little stretch to it-not a whole lot. I love both dress colors that I got: Steel Blue and Black painting (white with black splashes of colors and black outlines of flowers), and will plan on buying more colors in the future. Highly recommend this dress!

The photos don’t do this dress Justice. I LOVE this dress. It’s absolutely beautiful. We were inside a hotel’s conference center in central Texas in November. I don’t know what the inside temperature was, but this dress was unbelievable comfortable. I wasn’t hot or cold. The outside temperature was in the mid 70s. The dress is 100% polyester-inner lining as well as the sheer outer fabric. The dress is true to color. I ordered teal. The entire dress is teal, no secondary colors. I’m 5’1”, 139 pounds, 36DD, and wear a size 8 in my NY and Company petite dress pants. I’ve been wearing size 8 or 10 in jeans (Arizona Jean Co, Sonoma from Kohl’s). I ordered a size 10 in this dress due to others’ reviews. The 10 fit perfectly. I didn’t think the underarms were too high or tight. Maybe a smidge, but not enough to bother me. The dress has no pockets :o( The front on the bust has a vertical seam that caused the bust to be a bit pointy. You can see it from the side in one of the pictures. But again, I didn’t think it was that big of a deal. It’s hardly noticeable-I’m just anal about details. In the photos, I’m wearing a Maideform T-Shirt bra with underwire. No push up. The straps on the dress are wide enough that you don’t need a strapless bra. And the back is high enough that you can’t see the back bra strap. This dress is HAND WASH ONLY, and air dry. I followed the directions after wear and washed it in cold water in my tub, and am hanging it/laying it flat to dry. A little bit of the dye washed out when I was washing it-probably normal after a first wash. I would recommend heels with this dress. I tried dressy, strappy sandals, but it just didn’t do the dress Justice. This dress is amazing. My friends LOVED it. -Wife

In terms of fabric, I am not crazy about these polyester fibers, but this is pretty thick, fairly forgiving with underwear lines, and offers a bit of compression. I am typically an S in dresses (5'5 and 130 lbs), though my top part is actually XS (size 2). I followed their size chart and got an M. It fits just slightly large in the bust area, so I think it was the right decision to go with an M, as the S may have been tight. I love that the design is modern, but also versatile. You can dress this up or down. At this price, this dress is a steal. Super nice, so I definitely recommend it.

Extremely Short! Beware The sequins are beautiful and not too itchy but the dress is so short it's nit wearable unless you want to flash your cootch to the world. I but both a 2X and 3X with the intention of returning whichever didn't fit. The 3X came first and was big so I think the 2X would have worked best size wise which is what I normally wear. I'm 5'8" and typically wear a 20-22 pant and this dress was more like a tunic top length. If you wore with leggings or tights you'd be okay, but that wasn't the look I was going for. Very Sparkly!!! The sequins on this dress give it a beautiful sparkle both in person and in photos. The dress is fully lined, and I did not feel any areas where the sequins could scratch my skin. The outer layer of the dress is a velvet material which kind of reminds me of a few of the Halloween costumes I have had over the years. One positive thing about this kind of material is that it does not wrinkle easily, so I am pleased with that. For a plus sized girl I have a smaller bust, and I feel like the proportions in the bust area don’t fit me very well. I have short legs and a short torso. The cups that are present in this dress are sewn in between the two layers so it would be very difficult to remove them and adjust them. The dress is definitely too long for me, but I expected that as I am only slightly above 5 feet tall. I ordered this dress for a Yule ball coming up in December. I haven’t yet decided if I’m going to keep it. It will probably be my back up dress in case I can’t find some thing more flattering and more appropriate for my proportions. I would say the dress is very well-made and pretty comfortable. It’s definitely a bit heavy, which makes it good for a winter ball but not so great for a summertime wedding. I chose not to have the seller do any customizations because I knew there was a chance I might wish to return it, and if they customize it for you, it is not returnable. The Amazon listing said free returns so if I do end up returning it, I will update this review to let you know how the return process went.

The lining fabric is also bigger than the outter shell which causes the slit to curl outward exposing the lining. The lining is also longer than the outer shell by about 1 inch, and somehow the overall length is about 2-3 inches short when it's on. Overall, not worth the hassle to return, but will take a little work to make it worth keeping.

The size large fits me a little big from the waist and the back area. The size medium was too tight. I am going to sew the size large in to make it smaller. I am curvy at 5 ft 3 inches and I weigh 156 lbs. On me the bottom portion of the dress and the pleats look more accentuated because I have wide hip bones and thick legs. The 4 stars was for the sizing. I do like the vintage look of the dress. I always seek and buy these types of dresses to wear. After the dress gets altered with sewing, I am wearing the dress with black tights to a traditional cathedral mass service.

Weird seam and stretchy fabric The straps are adjustable, which is great and the cowl neck was exactly as expected. There is a seam going diagonally through the bust. In the model pictures, she is bending over so it looked like a natural fold in fabric, or she has her hand over it so you can't see it and it's in a weird place, definitely didn't like it. I thought it was a manufacturing flaw but I ordered two sizes/ colors and they both had it. I'd say it has a fair amount of stretch, I tried both a medium and a small because of my hip measurement, and still felt like even tbe small was pretty stretchy (for reference, my hips measure 40") and I knew no matter what size I bought the bust would be too big for me. The slit was not too high, and added some sex appeal to the dress. It also hit at a good spot on my knees (I'm 5'6") I'd also say you need to choose your undergarments carefully. It showed every little line and even some moles! If it wasn't for that weird diagonal seam across the chest I would have given it 4 stars, but it really took the whole dress down.

Beautiful dress, great deal for the price. The things I really like about this dress are, first of all, it looks great, the print is beautiful, I love the style, this dress is very flattering, and I also love that it has pockets, huge bonus for me. I am 5ft 2in, 137 lbs. 36-D bra size. I ordered this dress in a medium, it does fit and it looks great, but it is a little tight at the waist. I does fit me a lot better when I wear shape wear underneath. It looks like it fits perfect. A large may have been better for my size though, but I worry a large would look too big, and not as fitted (I don’t know because I haven’t tried the large). The dress is mid-calf length on me, which I think is perfect. This dress does have two downfalls for me, both of which I might not have if I had gotten the large instead of medium, but I once again, I don’t know because I have not tried it on in a large. The first is that it was very tricky to zip up, I could not zip it up myself, I had to get my spouse to zip it for me. The other downfall for me is that I do have slightly limited range of motion in my shoulders and upper arms in this dress, it does not fit me quite right in the underarm area, which does limit my arm movements a little. For the most part this is not a problem because most of the time I am going someplace that I need to be dressed nice, I don’t need to move my arms that much, but it would make it hard to hold a baby or toddler, or dance, and it also makes it so it would be hard for me to wear to work. I would say the quality of this dress is medium, it is not a super high quality fabric, but it is not low quality either. The fabric is thin, but not see through, and I have no complaints about the quality of fabric or the stitching. Overall, I am very pleased with this dress, it is beautiful, very flattering, and very good deal for the price.

Soft, Comfortable, Easy To Dress Up, & Very Flattering - True To Size The title basically covers it. The pink was brighter than I expected but it worked wonderfully for the Diwali party I attended.For size reference I bought a Medium and it was perfect. I weigh about 150-150 lbs, am 5 ft 7", and hold most of my weight in my hips and butt. I also have an unflattering poochy belly because I like cheesecake but the dress didn't cling to my stomach. It fit nicely around my hips and waist so I still had body definition and didn't look like I was wearing a sack.Measurements are approximately: 36 C, 29" natural waist (smallest point), 32-33" under my belly button, 44" hips. Again, I like cookies so am not in my ideal weight range/shape but found the dress flattering, slimming, and elongating.

Good Quality for Cost; Brooch is Trash The top and pants are an okay quality, especially for the price. The fabric is a bit different than I expected as it seems to be a thicker fiber, almost a thin canvas texture. Even so, it is soft to the touch and the shape and drape of the top is as expected. I typically run a 22W in dressy clothing but experience tells me things from non-US sellers can run small so I ordered the 24W. I was wrong this time. The top is a tiny bit baggier than I’d like and I have to roll the top band of the pants down once to get the bagginess out of the seat and crotch area. I’m about 5’ 6.5” and the length with it rolled will allow me to wear flats. The black color is a true black and there is no transparency. So this brooch, though! Ugh. It’s a nice touch but it’s pretty much garbage as you can see in the photos. It’s craft grade plastic gems in flimsy metal prong seats along with some gold seed beads loosely sewn onto some black felt with a pin hot glued to the back of it. I wasn’t expecting some high quality jewels or anything but this is embarrassingly unwearable. Bottom line is the outfit is pretty good and I’d definitely recommend it, but don’t buy it expecting a fancy brooch since you’ll probably just throw that out like I did. Edit: I wore this all evening at my niece’s wedding. I danced a ton and was moving around all night in a warm venue. I bumped my rating up from the 4 stars I initially gave to 5 stars since this held up perfectly and it was very breathable and comfortable all evening. The wrinkles from shipping and washing came right out with a medium hot steam iron. I’m very pleased with my purchase and may end up looking for more colors!

Beautiful Velvet Dress The velvet dress in Burnt Orange is gorgeous. The burnt orange color is very rich and will look beautiful especially during fall. I like how the dress accentuates my waist and the way the skirt falls in the front. I am 5'2", 140lbs, bust 37" and waist 31". According to the size chart I am a Large from the bust and XL from the waist. I ordered a Large and the dress is not tight from the waist but feels a little tight from the bust. The front opening is a little too deep for a curvy lady like me but wearing a thin cami will help; so far I haven't been wearing a cami but it makes me aware of the cleavage. I think that an XL will fit great, therefore I recommend sizing up if you are in between sizes. I wash the dress using a cold delicate cycle and allow it to air dry. I removed any wrinkles left by steaming it. The fabric still looks as new. The dress had a smell that was mostly gone after washing. I love this dress and I like how easy is to take care of it.

She really like that there is a thick built in slip and that the V neck can be shortened via a button, which allows her the choice of revealing more or less depending on the mood she is in. The dress is long, and it is meant to be that way but might be to long for vertically challenged people as my wife is 5'3 and even with 3-inch heels on the bottom of the dress still hides her feet and almost drag the ground as she walks, she tells me she loves the dress so much she will just have to buy higher heels :)

Love/hate relationship There are things I both love and hate about this dress. For reference I’m a 4x in Torrid tops & dresses, 5’11.5” bra size 46C Loves: -length of the dress and sleeves (tall girl friendly!) -the v-neck (although a little deep for me, it looked fine with a broach holding it in place, and was still flattering even with it open) -the slits (I love how when I walk you can see a lot of leg-they did not open all the way while walking, only about lower to mid thigh) Hates: -the material FEELS fine, but it looks VERY cheap (to me the cost should be MUCH cheaper!) -the weird loops/extra material around the waistline; it’s not flattering, and I guess they want it to look like a wrap dress but it’s a fail. They would have been better off leaving the material as straps that you could wrap yourself! -it hugs my “apron” tummy too much! I even sized up so it was pretty big on me except for the fact that it CLUNG to my tummy My husband liked it on me so I’m going to try getting it altered to flatter my body better (and to close up the slits-see how high they are in one pic-to the top of my stomach!!!!) If the sleeveless dress goes on sale in another color I will try it, but I definitely would not purchase for the regular price! Not worth it!!!

Beautiful, shimmery, elegent dresses! These dresses did not disappoint! Beautifully made, fully lined, heavy, quality fabric. These dresses were worth way more than the price! We did have to exchange 3 of the ones we ordered because they were too big but the seller was AMAZING and rushed them to us with plenty of time for the wedding! We ended up having the illusion panel closed up as a couple of the girls felt like they were a little too low and the bodice was loose on all the girls, even the 36 DD bust! So measure carefully!!! Also, the split is ridiculously high so it definitely has to be fixed or pinned, it's literally to the waist! The dress is fully floor length, the two under 5'5" bridesmaids had to have them hemmed (which requires a skilled seamstress since it is not an easy task as there is a wide panel of stiffened fabric so the length lays well). Also, the shimmer is perfect. We were worried as one of the reviews said it wasn't that shimmery, but we were very pleased!

Elegant lines | Scrumptious fabric | Quality construction This “blue haze” colored gown is size 12 and matches my eye color perfectly. The fit of the bodice on me is almost perfect (my measurements are 39-1/2” bust, 33” waist, 39” hips). Its deep-cut v-neck works with my Victoria Secrets bra (wire-free Body by Victoria, size 34DDD). The dress lining gives the gown elegance as it moves around my shape. I will hand-stitch the bodice where the fabric crosses to ensure that the bodice pieces stay together and that where the shoulder seams meet my shoulder don’t slip off my shoulder. Zipper is hidden, and its pull-tab’s construction is sturdy, delicate-looking, exactly what one would expect on a quality garment. I plan to wear this gown to my daughter’s bestie’s evening November wedding activities so the short, ample-width “petal” sleeves give me some flexibility for the fickle weather Kansas offers in November (snow, rain, wind, or heat).

Very versatile, comfortable and sturdy dress! This black dress was perfect for my event. It looked classy without being uncomfortable. MATERIAL: The material wasn't thin or see through, had decent body to it. I will say the only thing that took away from the appeal was the slightly ribbed fabric, cheapens it a touch but acceptable for my event, I wouldn't wear the texture to a black tie formal event. FIT: I am 5'4 130lbs, semi-athletic build and a small was perfect. It came just over my knees and was fitted all the way down (not tubular and flared at the bottom like some weird dresses). When I first put it on it felt a little snug but the stretch was amazing and I stretched pulled on it a bit for more room in the hips/butt. The off the shoulder area was a little formfitting across my chest, and I do not have an exceptionally large chest (not draped across). The bodice fell nicely on my waist, and it was a classy length. I wore a strapless bra with one clear strap on the shoulder side of the dress. Overall, I would recommend this dress and may buy it in other colors!

Nice fabric and cut This blouse is lightweight, 100% Polyester. Easy to wash & dry with no ironing needed. In fact, it came out of the packaging ready to wear with no wrinkles. I ordered this in BLACK, size MEDIUM. I normally wear a size Large, but I didn't want an oversized flowing look (as shown in the listing photo). For me (5' 7", 170lbs) this blouse in size medium fits me well for a fitted look. If you want an oversized flowing fit, you should order your true size. The black fabric is NOT see-thru or shear. The blouse can easily be worn as casual with jeans, or dressy with slacks or a skirt. There is a tag that says UPF 50+. As with most long sleeve polyester blouses, it should provide adequate sun protection. In summary, order your true size for a flowing fit. Order one size smaller for a more fitted look. If you are a minimalist, this blouse will serve many purposes in your closet and can easily be your one "go to" blouse!

I just wish it was a little more opaque and that the lining went all the way down.

A cute, cold-shoulder jumpsuit for spring and summer. This Dokotoo jumpsuit is so cute! I chose the khaki in a size small, after viewing the provided size chart. The color pictured is accurate to what I received and the size is true to size. There is some horizontal stretch in the woven fabric, but basically no vertical stretch. The fabric is lightweight and breathable, and has a slight ripple look to it. On me, the jumpsuit is plenty big on top, so I’m thankful for the clear modesty snap at the bust. I found that tying the shoulder straps as tight as possible also helped with the fit. With the shoulder ties completely tied, a bit of my bra straps are visible on my shoulders, so I’ll either wear clear/translucent bra straps or a skin colored bra. There are nice sized pockets on each side, which are deep enough to conceal my entire hand or even a larger phone…mine is a iPhone 12 Pro and fits with room to spare. On my short waisted body, the multi stitched, smock waistband looks best positioned around my rib cage, rather than at my natural waist. If I pull it down to my actual waistline, the crotch hangs so low that it looks odd. Regardless, the length of the pants goes down to my ankles. All in all, the quality of the jumpsuit is good, with no notable construction issues. The cold shoulder design is a cute feature for the upcoming warmer months. The care tag states it’s 100% polyester and machine washable, so I followed my usual laundering process. I washed it in a delicates bag with cool water on the gentle cycle and then hung it on a drying rack to air dry. The jumpsuit looked like new after the laundering process. I think it looks as cute with flats as it does with heels. I think the price point is reasonable and like the variety of colors to choose from. I am pleased with it and would recommend it. For reference, my measurements are: Height - 5’4” Bust - 36” Waist - 30” Arm length - 22.5” Shoulder width - 15” Weight - 115# Inseam - 31”

Beautiful classic old-school/retro dress design This dress captured my attention due to its classic 1950s and 60s retro look. It reminded my of the dresses my grandmother's would wear to church, shopping downtown or to one of their club luncheons. The style of the dress is classic with a squared off neckline, short flared sleeves and a full flared skirt. The dress comes in 4 colors, I ordered the medium (US 8-10) in the airy blue color, which is a perfect baby blue color. The dress is lined, which made it a bit snug in the bodice area for me. I am 5'6, 150 lbs and am larger on the top than on the bottom. Because of the lining, I could have ordered a large, but I feared it would be to loose. As long as you know your size when a dress has a lining, you cannot go wrong with this dress; it runs true to size. The dress material is 95% polyester & 5% elastane. The lining material is 98% polyester & 2% Viscose. So, the dress does have some streetch and give to accommodate for the lining, which also has some streetch. When I tried the dress on, it fell about 2 inches below my knees and it was about 42 inches long from the top of the shoulder to the bottom of the skirt of the dress. The skirt of the dress has nice deep pockets on the sides. I really enjoy a dress with deep pockets. The dress should be washed in cold water and dried flat. One nice touch was the tag on this 5 star dress from the designer to the customer, although the syntax was a bit off, the request for feedback and the overall sentiment and look of the tag was quite positive. The tag ended with the following statement: "Have a nice day!"

AMAZING dress, perfect for my nuptials!!! This dress could not have been more perfect for our elopement nuptials. It is sassy, classy, sweet, and sexy at the same time. And the details on this thing are so intricate and beautiful! I have gotten and am still receiving SO many compliments on this dress! My measurements are 41-35-45, 186 pounds, and the Large fit perfectly. The dress has very good stretch, so it should work if you’re a bit bigger than I am. I actually ordered the XL too, just in case, and it did fit okay, but it didn’t hug my curves the way the Large does. The zipper did hang just a little in the back, but it was not enough to detract from the rest of the look. I added a silver and rhinestone brooch to the waistline, also purchased on Amazon. I didn’t want a whole sash because I don’t favor the look of the tied back, and the only brooch I loved had a weak pin, so I sewed it to the dress, and it worked out great. This dress is so easy as well as beautiful. I just pulled it on without even unzipping it, although I was careful about the sleeves. I didn’t want the ordeal of stretching and struggling to get the zipper up, mainly because my arms are a bit big, and I didn’t want to risk tearing it while stretching. I did use a shaper underneath. The dress material is not very thick, so if a shaper is used, you have to make sure it fits your body almost perfectly so that it doesn’t make the dress look misshapen. I used one from David’s Bridal, also purchased via Amazon. I had bought three other expensive dresses for when we were planning a big wedding, and I had actually chosen this one as a reception dress. Before we canceled the big wedding, I was seriously considering this as my main ceremony dress because I loved it that much. I will STILL wear this as my reception dress when we have that. I’ll probably post more pics lol. This was my dream dress, and I still can’t believe my dream dress was less than $40. Would recommend to anyone, whether on a budget or not. I can’t wait to wear this dress again at our reception, and it’s even budget-friendly enough to buy another one if the sidewalk dirt doesn’t come out. Forgot to mention, my husband LOVED me in this dress too, which meant a lot to me. Not a single complaint. Absolutely love it!

I think she looks great in it… This dress has an inner lining that goes down to the knees, so you don’t have to wear a slip. It’s a thin, cool material, so it can be used as a spring-summer dress, but it’s not so thin that it’s see-through or feels cheaply made. It’s a solid, so it does require some “dressing up” with a piece of jewelry such as a necklace or an attractive belt. Otherwise it might look matronly (that’s why it’s a 4 star). The sleeves have a mild “poof,” and they are elastic but are not tight. My wife ordered a medium. She’s usually a medium, but rarely a large. And she requested the black dress because she feels that black is slimming. She’s 5’3 1/2” tall, so you can try to gauge the length from the attached photos. On her, the dress comes down nearly to the ankles. To put the dress on, she simply slipped it over her head and did not need to undo the button. She washed it in cold water, permanent press cycle, and hung it to dry without any issues.

It has potential This dress has potential, because the material is silky and pretty and it is made well enough. I ordered the purple, but honestly it looks closer to mauve. The dress zips down the back for you to step into, and then you need someone to zip it up. For me, I ordered a size small. It fits up top, but my hips do not lie in this thing. It’s skin type and not flattering. My rear looks like it’s squeezed into a sausage casing. Oddly, I like the dress anyway, just not on me. If you are shaped differently, with regular sized or small hips, this dress would possibly look very attractive. I do have to point out that this dress is cut slightly different than the advertised photo too. The arms are deeply cut into the chest area. In other words, you show off your shoulders and part of your chest. If you know how a “muscle shirt” is cut deeply like an extreme tank top, then you may know what I mean by this. Again: if I had a very cute figure, it would not matter and would likely be a great looking dress. The neckline is cute and clean looking, the lines are nice, the length is perfect, since it falls to the knee and isn’t way too short. This dress is very sexy if you have the body for it. Don’t even think about trying this if you have body parts that need to be camouflaged or hidden. I’m 52 years old. I look very cute in certain clothes that flatter me. This dress does not flatter me. If I were toned like I used to be, it would be probably be game on. As it is, I am not planning on wearing it, though, because the days of being able to flaunt my figure are over. To sum up my review: this dress is amazing, but revealing and unforgiving. Also, it wrinkles easily and a lot, but a steamer works wonders. You could wear this dress to a wedding, out dancing, to a nice social event, or even to church. Just be aware that it isn’t for everyone.

The dress is also really figure flattering and I felt confident all night in it. I weigh 162 lbs and ordered the medium. It fits true to size.

Very forgiving dress. This dress helps cover problem areas because of the rouching. First ordered in a large (I am 5’6”, 155 pds. 36DD, hips 41”.) it was too big around the top especially, medium fit much better. Accentuates the curves nicely. Happy with purchase.
So flattering! This dress hides the belly! I’m 5’4 and 170 lb I got a large and it was perfect! Super cute

Gorgeous! This dress hugs in all the right places with just enough stretch to conform to your body...but also enough tightness to suck you in! I'm 5"6....310lbs..... bra size 44i...and normally a size 20 dress. I ordered a 3XL and it was a JUST perfect fit. The straps on the dress tighten and loosen. I tightened mine alot in order to hold my breast in place. I did not wear a bra and they were secure. There is a long zipper going down the side that was very hard to zip back up even with help. So I recommend keeping it zipped, step into it from the top of the dress, and shimmy it up your body.

Value is there!!

Best dress ever This dress I have no words. It's perfect Firstly it's a million times better than our original bridesmaids dress and I bought 1 size bigger than my usual dress size which I'll advice anyone to do especially if you're on the bigger size like myself. The quality, from the material to the details it is outstanding. The corset fit tugs you right in (enough to hide those so called love handles) I'm 5'3 ~161cm and the dress still covered the heels. So it is a long dress. The tallest bridesmaid was like 5'8 and it was still a good length. My dress size (16) wasn't in stock however they said it would be on the 15th Feb but these guys work fast because my dress was ready AND delivered on the 15th which was great because the wedding was on the 20th. Anywhoooo I am babbling now. Just buy the dress it's totally worth the worth.

Yesssss to this dress!!! This dress is 🔥!!! The colors, the sequins…everything! Buy it. It is best for someone tall or with very high heels! I would say 5’7” and it will be at floor length. It is very beautiful and looks far more expensive than what I paid! Great pattern and you will NOT see anyone else with a dress like it. Great for a prom or themed party (Wild was the theme I went for).

Fits like a glove! No need for shape wear!!! This dress is 🔥🔥🔥 I have never received so many compliments in my life. For reference, I’m 5’3 and a very curvy 10/12. This dress fit like a glove without making me feel self conscious. I haven’t felt this sexy since having my son but this dress really made me feel stunning. I did prefer to wear smoothing short type underwear because I didn’t want to have any panty lines and didn’t feel like wearing none would be appropriate with the split going fairly high. Other than that, I have zero tips, tricks, complaints, etc. 10/10 would recommend 🔥🔥🔥

THE BEST!!! This dress is 10/10!! It has the softest fabric and fits so well!! I’m 5’9 and it gave enough coverage and not short at all!!! I got a size XL and it was great! The fabric has abit of stretch to it!

Elegant dress This dress is 100% polyester. It looks very elegant and is great to wear to a fancy function. The dress is fitted, but it looks great on curvy women. You many want to wear a smoothing garment underneath to hide any bumps, and the dress may need to be hemmed depending on your height. For reference, I am 5'3, 145 pounds, and the dress was dragging a bit with 3.5 in heels.

Too short for this lady This dress is 10x’s more beautiful in person. It was very comfortable. I am 5’10”. No shoe I tried with it including a variety of flats looked good to me. I wish there was a tall in addition to petites. 😁

I love this dress This dress is a 90s mean girl style dress! I have always wanted one! The color is beautiful. The material is soft and stretchy! It is a bit snug tho but a small does fit me but if you want it less close fitting definitely size up! I'm 5'1 and 155lbs for a size reference

Very lightweight and flowy This dress is a beautiful wardrobe addition for hot summer events. The off white is lighter than the product photos which look more lighter beige-- it truly is ivory in real life. Because of that, I could see this dress being great for a bridal shower or similar. The fabric is very light and airy. This dress is perfect for sweltering summer heat, especially with the addition of the side slits. The skirt is half lined because of the slits and, while you can see the under skirt cutoff through the white fabric, the lining is absolutely opaque. I wore dark undergarments in my review images and you can't see them at all. I'm a size 10, 32DD, and ordered the medium. It flows really nicely and it wouldn't be a problem if it were to shrink a little in the wash. At 5'10, the dress is lower-mid calf length on me, just a little shorter than the product photos (which I predicted and am happy with). If you are shorter, it will likely be a true maxi dress.

The addition of pockets is a plus, and the dress seems adaptable enough to accommodate a slightly larger size. Overall, it's stunning, high-quality, and garnered plenty of compliments—a definite win!

Great Material & Fit, Lacks Comfort This dress is a great value for the price; it has a nice sturdy, snatching material, but it is not the most comfortable near the boob/arm pit area. However, if you can get past the discomfort of that silicone gripper the dress hugs in all the right places and is a strong enough material to pull you in and not be see through. 5’7” 160 lbs, 34 DD, with a little bit of a pooch from recently having a baby and I chose a Medium based on other reviews. Could have worn a large, but I don’t think it would have tucked me in as well as the medium did, and it was big enough to hold “the girls” in place. Wore the dress for 10 hours and survived. Buy the dress. Update: accidentally washed and dried this “dry clean only” dress and it still looks great.

Beautiful dress with serious quirks This dress is a lovely material and style, but the way-too-long train made it a no-go. I also think a smaller or hidden zipper & dropping the waist a couple of inches to the belly button would be more flattering. I’m 5’6” 132 lbs 34-36B & size 6 fit well. Amazon recommended size 8, but it was too loose.

Beautiful but perhaps not for large busts This dress is a lovely silky fabric and has a lovely flow. I wore this in Vegas and it was perfect for 100 degree heat. The midriff is comfy when eating and walking a lot and the slit is sexy but manageable (I’m 5’9). It’s more cleavage than I usually show, but it’s Vegas lol. However. The tie knot is a risky move with a large bust, especially after having 2 kids (iykyk). Even with stick on bra cups I was showing way more underboob than I wanted. But since I liked the dress a lot I ended up tying it as tight as I could, then I tucked the ends of the ties into the keyhole, spread them out to cover the hole, then sewed them down around the edges. So yes it negated the cute keyhole look, but it worked for me.
Love This dress is a medium, I’m 5’2 160lbs, and it fits great of course a little long but with heels or tie like I did. Really cute FYI both vest and dress from Amazon.

Beautiful and Elegant Dress This dress is a must have!!! This dress shows all the curves, fits just right. The lace is gorgeous but, the dress underneath is very short. I thought since I am 5’0 I would be ok. But my assets made it a tad bit too short. I received compliments all night. Seriously ladies get you one.

These curves don't lie! This dress is a new favourite because of the cut and fit! It is a true surplice so you can have a 42-32-40 figure and have those curves accommodated. The size chart is very accurate. The material makes it glide more than hug even if it is wonderfully bodycon! The ruching is flattering and the cross-over centre has a modesty panel so it isn't too revealing. The dress hit just above my knee on a 5'7" frame with a 32" inseam. You will want to give it a light steam out of the package and it is the sort of material that will show any bump of any undergarment. It isn't thick, but it is substantial and opaque. There's plenty of stretch and the colour is lovely without any shine. Which is all to say that this is a dress that will let you show off your curves. 5 definite stars.

Showstopper Elegance! This dress is a showstopper for any upcoming semi formal or formal event! I selected this dress for an upcoming evening wedding I am attending in December. I am 5 foot 6 inches and weigh 133 pounds and I selected the size small in burgundy/red. I would describe the fit of this dress is true to size. The cut of the dress did hug all of my curves so I am contemplating wearing a body shaping garmet underneath the dress to smooth out some of my "extra curvy" areas! However the fabric is a stretchy polyester feel that gives and is forgiving on my figure! This dress is comfortable and feels good in both the standing and sitting position. I plan to dance the night away at this wedding and this dress moves well. The dress has a high slit that comes right above my knee. Sexy but not over the top! The dress has a nice belt that does not feel or look cheap. I have included an image of the belt. The waistline features a side zipper that makes the dress easy to get in and out of. The underside of the dress is a slightly different color but does not stand out when you walk, move etc. I have also included an image of the underside of this dress. Overall a nice dress for formal events at a very reasonable price point! I plan to style this dress with a metallic pair of heels, handbag and hoop earrings! Stop the show! 5 stars!

Thick stretched material This dress is a size 3X and I where a 42DD and am 41in waist, 47 I’m hips and stand 5’8. I really like the material bc it’s thick, stretches and it’s comfortable. Bought for an all black party. 5 stars ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Hello Goldengoddress!!! This Dress is a stunner!!! LOVED IT!! Yes, fit perfect for me. 5'6" 139lbs, 34D. I did NOT feel any rubbing of the dress near my armpits, you girls know. Yet again, I had a couple of glasses of wine and then I really didn't feel it. 😉.

WOW This dress is a stunner. It holds everything in and gives support. For reference I am a size 36G bra and size 2/4 in jeans/leggings. I purchased a medium. It was tough to get this on over my hips because of the shapewear and the straps are a bit flimsy but I don't even care because it makes me look like a BOMBSHELL. Everything looks great, stays in place, and it is very comfortable. I didn't feel like I was constantly adjusting myself and it gave me a perfect hourglass shape. I don't love all the popilush dresses but this one is a WINNER.

Wow Great dress! This dress is a stunner. The material is a thin slinky material with great stretch. It does show underwear lines if you don't wear something smoothing underneath. On me the dress was big in the top and very fitted in the hips. Even though the hips were tight I could still walk and dance freely because it's so stretchy. I tried a small and a medium and ultimately ended up keeping the small. I had it taken in at the waist about a 1/2 inch and also hemmed as it was really long. For reference I am 5'5 118lb 34-26-38. I ordered the color green and it was a dark shade of emerald. It is a little darker than it appears in the picture online. In certain lighting it can look darker or lighter because it has a nice silly sheen to the fabric. This dress is an awesome style for the price.
